label: Bullish
explanation: 7/10 is bullish from a 7-day headline keyword scan. Bullish drivers: Stock Market Today, July 14: Growth Stocks Rally as Inflation Cools to 3.5%, Equaling 2020 Lows; Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise as Fed rate-hike bets ease, chip stocks rally - Yahoo Finance. Bearish offsets: Update: US Equity Indexes Mixed as IBM Sell-Off Hits Dow, Cooling Inflation Eases Interest-Rate Pressure.
